task: Remove emojis from handover markdown output and eliminate misleading completion_pct metric that contradicts accomplishments tracking
discussion_summary: User identified two data quality issues: (1) hardcoded emojis in writer.py causing parsing problems, (2) completion_pct field generated independently from accomplishments[].done, creating contradictory signals about task completion. Session focused on removing both the emoji rendering and the completion_pct schema field from writer.py, reader.py, and the LLM prompt in checkpoint.py. Changes were committed and pushed to main.

accomplishments.what: Removed hardcoded emoji characters (✅, 🔲) from handover markdown writer
Eliminated completion_pct field from handover JSON schema to prevent contradictory completion signals
Updated checkpoint.py LLM prompt to remove completion_pct from schema definition and generation rules
Committed and pushed all three file changes to main branch

next_actions.action: Verify context checkpoint cards display correct 'turns remaining' in staging environment — this was listed as an open goal and needs validation after the schema changes
next_actions.why: Ensures the removal of completion_pct didn't break turn counting or context display logic

next_actions.action: Run full test suite on writer.py and reader.py to confirm handover JSON generation works without emojis and completion_pct
next_actions.why: Validate that the schema changes don't break serialization or deserialization

next_actions.action: Begin Phase 3.12 implementation — user confirmed readiness at session start, three 3.11 fixes are pushed, S1 (user_rejected_decisions extraction) is mostly done
next_actions.why: Unblocks the next roadmap phase now that data quality issues are resolved

decisions.decision: Remove completion_pct entirely rather than reconcile it with accomplishments[].done
decisions.reason: The two fields derive from independent sources (holistic LLM estimate vs. explicit task tracking) and routinely contradict; single source of truth is cleaner

decisions.decision: Strip all emoji characters from markdown output rather than replace with text equivalents
decisions.reason: User explicitly stated emojis cause parsing issues and are unwanted; plain text is more robust

user_rejected_decisions.what_was_proposed: Keep completion_pct as a holistic estimate field alongside accomplishments tracking
user_rejected_decisions.user_signal: User flagged it as misleading and contradictory; asked to remove it

user_rejected_decisions.what_was_proposed: Keep emojis in handover markdown for visual clarity
user_rejected_decisions.user_signal: User stated 'i don't like them and they will cause parsing issues, so please drop them'

relational_files.why: Calls handover writer; affected by schema changes
Phase 3.12 roadmap was referenced at session start; next phase to begin
